title: Last Comment Column
excerpt: I would love to see a column that is called ‘Last Comment’ and it shows the very last comment made in the conversations box, so you can see at a glance what the last update was without having to click into conversations …

posts.author: MelB (Melanie Broxis)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see a column that is called ‘Last Comment’ and it shows the very last comment made in the conversations box, so you can see at a glance what the last update was without having to click into conversations or hover over for status comments.

posts.author: jpellegrino89 (Joe)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this is such a big deal to get a glance of everything going on line by line in a board.
